title: Analytics Integration
description: Overlay page view and transition analytics on your navigation map using the AnalyticsAdapter interface.

sections.heading: AnalyticsAdapter Interface
sections.content: Implement this interface to connect any analytics provider. Pass the adapter to the NavMap `analytics` prop to enable the analytics overlay.

sections.heading: PostHog Example
sections.content: The built-in PostHog adapter queries the PostHog HogQL API for page views.

sections.heading: Custom Adapter
sections.content: Build your own adapter for Google Analytics, Plausible, or any data source.
